name: Crockpot Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the hamburger, breadcrumbs, egg, grated parmesan cheese, parsley, oregano, onion powder, garlic powder, and milk together until well combined.
2. Form small meatballs from the mixture.
3. Pour the ketchup and beer into the crockpot.
4. Place the raw meatballs in the sauce and cover with the ketchup-beer mixture.
5. Simmer for several hours.
6. Optionally, bake the meatballs first to remove most of the grease before simmering them in the crockpot.
